MigrationRecord.description: Records an applied migration step with chain tracking and verification status

id.description: Unique identifier for the migration record

schemaName.description: Name of the schema that was migrated

fromVersion.description: Schema version before migration (null for fresh deploy)

checksum.description: Hash of the target schema content for drift detection

appliedAt.description: Unix timestamp when migration was applied

statements.description: SQL statements executed in this migration

success.description: Whether the DDL execution completed without errors

verified.description: Whether post-execution verification confirmed tables/columns exist

errorMessage.description: Error message if migration or verification failed

verificationDetails.description: Details of what was verified (tables checked, columns checked, results)
